title: AntiCheatPlugin
body:
🛡️ AntiCheatPlugin – Lightweight AntiCheat for Paper (1.21.8+)

AntiCheatPlugin is a lightweight but intelligent anti-cheat solution designed for Paper servers. It detects common unfair advantages and chat abuse while staying performance-friendly and easy to manage.

Perfect for small and medium-sized servers that want solid protection without heavy overhead.

🚀 Detection Systems

✈ Fly Hack Detection
Detects players attempting to fly without permission.

💎 X-Ray / Diamond Detection
Monitors suspicious diamond mining patterns and alerts admins.

💬 Chat Cheat Detection
Identifies spam, flooding, and suspicious keywords in chat.

🚪 Join Timeout Check
Players who are timed out cannot bypass punishment by rejoining.

⏱ Timeout Escalation System
Repeat offenders receive longer timeouts automatically.

⚙️ Admin & Moderation Tools

🔔 Improved Admin Alerts
Get notified instantly when suspicious behavior is detected.

🛡 Bypass Permission
Allow trusted players or staff to bypass checks.

🔧 Automatic Punishments
Configurable timeouts and kicks.

🚀 Performance Friendly

✔ Designed to be lightweight
✔ No external dependencies
✔ Safe for long-running servers

🔑 Permissions
anticheat.timeout
anticheat.untimeout
anticheat.alert
anticheat.bypass

If you have any questions or ideas for the plugin, please contact us at: anticheatplugin10@gmail.com
